commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a nil guard before stopping Augment keepalive and adds an XCTest that asserts disabled stop calls do not emit stopped logs when no keepalive exists.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main logs the stopped message even when no keepalive exists, and the PR body includes a negative main test log for that path. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation cannot provide evidence from the contributor's runtime setup.

target.title: Make Augment keepalive stop idempotent
target.body:
## Summary
Skip Augment keepalive stop work when no keepalive is active, avoiding repeated stop logs for already-stopped runtimes.

## Validation
- `swift test --filter AugmentProviderRuntimeTests`
- `swift test --filter AugmentStatusProbeTests`
- `git diff --check`

## Runtime Proof
Updated at `d0b2082d` with a regression test that asserts the actual log behavior.

Fixed-branch proof:

```text
$ swift test --filter AugmentProviderRuntimeTests
Test Case '-[CodexBarTests.AugmentProviderRuntimeTests test_disabledStopDoesNotLogWithoutKeepalive]' passed (0.225 seconds).
Executed 1 test, with 0 failures
```

Negative proof against `main` using a temporary worktree with only the new test file applied:

```text
$ swift test --filter AugmentProviderRuntimeTests
... XCTAssertFalse failed - Disabled stop calls should not emit stopped logs when no keepalive exists:

[2026-06-01T06:49:15.230Z] [INFO] com.steipete.codexbar.augment: Augment keepalive stopped (provider disabled)
[2026-06-01T06:49:15.230Z] [INFO] com.steipete.codexbar.augment: Augment keepalive stopped (provider disabled)
Executed 1 test, with 1 failure
```

Compatibility check already run for this PR:

```text
$ swift test --filter AugmentStatusProbeTests
Executed 17 tests, with 0 failures
```

Also ran `git diff --check`; it passed with no output. The runtime proof is redacted to the Augment log line only and does not include account or token data.
